zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Fleetwood a Knight於1492年出生在英國藍卡爾波爾頓 勒 費爾德時，他的父親Edward Fleetwood of Hesketh26歲，母親Elizabeth Holland24歲。他於1505年與Helena Standish在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年在英國爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Fleetwood a Knight于1492年出生在英国藍卡爾波爾頓 勒 費爾德时，他的父亲Edward Fleetwood of Hesketh26岁，母亲Elizabeth Holland24岁。他于1505年与Helena Standish在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年在英国爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleetwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called with Old English flēot ‘stream, estuary’ + wudu ‘wood’, possibly in or near Kirkby in Walton, Lancashire. The existing Fleetwood, Lancashire acquired its name in the 19th century from its founder, Sir Peter Hesketh Fleetwood, and is not the source of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Fleetwood a Knight was born in 1492, in Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, England, his father, Edward Fleetwood of Hesketh, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Holland, was 24. He married Helena Standish in 1505, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1525, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 33.

Il a épousé Helena Standish en 1505, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1525, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Fleetwood a Knight(이)가 1492년 영국 랭카실르 파우턴 일 피드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Fleetwood of Hesketh(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Holland(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1505년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Helena Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 영국 체실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Fleetwood a Knight родился в 1492 г. в местности поултон л филд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Fleetwood of Hesketh было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Holland, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena Standish в 1505 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1525 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
